title: Initialize the Transition Intelligence Protocol repository

subject.name: Transition Intelligence Protocol
subject.initial_state: Concept exists without a verified working repository
subject.target_state: Repository has a specification, examples, validation, and automated feedback

parameters: GitHub Actions on main and pull requests
assumptions: canonical examples represent the current protocol vocabulary
the dependency-free validator covers the documented schema subset

feedback.method: Run canonical record validation and validator self-tests
feedback.expected_signal: Canonical records pass and intentionally invalid records fail
feedback.observed_signal: Canonical records passed and negative fixtures were rejected for expected reasons
